titleStmt.title: Dutch parliamentary corpus ParlaMint-NL [ParlaMint]
Corpus van het Nederlandse Parlement ParlaMint-NL [ParlaMint]
Minutes of the Eerste Kamer and Tweede Kamer of The Netherlands (2015-2022)
Minuten van de Eerste en Tweede Kamer van Nederland (2015-2022)

respStmt.resp: Downloading and converting the corpus to TEI format

availability.p: This work is licensed under theCreative Commons Attribution 4.0 International License

bibl.title: Minutes of the Eerste Kamer of The Netherlands
Minutes of the Tweede Kamer of The Netherlands

projectDesc.p: ParlaMint is a project that aims to (1) create a multilingual set of comparable corpora of parliamentary proceedings uniformly encoded according to the ParlaMint encoding guidelines, covering the period from 2015 to mid-2022; (2) add linguistic annotations to the corpora and machine-translate them to English; (3) make the corpora available through concordancers; and (4) build use cases in Political Sciences and Digital Humanities based on the corpus data.

correction.p: No correction of source texts was performed.

normalization.p: Through the dat collection process several Unicode hair space charactars were present in the text, these have been removed.

hyphenation.p: No end-of-line hyphens were present in the source.

quotation.p: Quotation marks have been left in the text and are not explicitly marked up.

segmentation.p: The texts are segmented into utterances (speeches) and segments (corresponding to paragraphs in the source transcription).

prefixDef.p: Private URIs with this prefix point to elements giving their name. In this document they are simply local references into the Topic taxonomy categories in the corpus root TEI header.

revisionDesc.change: parlamint2release script: Fix some identifiable erros for the release.
Tomaž Erjavec: Include topic related information.
